directive_verbatim: ARCHITECT ORDER — CLOUD FACTORY SUBSTRATE v0. P0-PGR is the command brain. Now design the execution substrate that lets founder/client orders run through cloud factory lines. Mission: Design Cloud Factory Substrate v0 for Noetfield / SourceA / Forge. Goal: A founder or client order should become a governed prompt packet, route into an isolated cloud sandbox/worktree, execute through factory lines, produce a preview/artifact, verify itself, and write a receipt. Required layers: 1. Order Intake (founder order, client order, API order, Studio IDE order). 2. P0-PGR Integration (classify order, ROI score, compile prompt packet, route to factory line). 3. Factory Line Registry (lines: research, architecture, code, no-code app builder, workflow builder, test, deploy-preview, verifier, receipt, harvest). 4. Sandbox Manager (sandbox_id, repo/worktree allocation, branch naming, allowed file scope, env secret policy, timeout, cost cap, cleanup rule, artifact storage, receipt path). 5. Execution Targets (use existing stack first: GitHub Actions, Cloudflare Workers, Railway API, Supabase, repo worktrees, future container runners if needed). 6. Client Product Modes (Mode A: Agentic Workflow Builder; Mode B: No-code App Builder). 7. Safety Gates (no direct main writes, preview before production, founder/client approval before deploy, no sends without approval, no legal/equity/payment claims without approval, receipts required). 8. MVP Build Plan (Phase 1: internal founder-only cloud factory; Phase 2: authenticated client workspace; Phase 3: workflow builder; Phase 4: no-code app builder; Phase 5: paid client platform). Deliverables: CLOUD_FACTORY_SUBSTRATE_v0.md, FACTORY_LINE_REGISTRY_v0.json, SANDBOX_MANAGER_SPEC_v0.md, CLIENT_ORDER_TO_FACTORY_RUN_SCHEMA_v0.json, MVP_ACTIVATION_PLAN_v0.md. Return architecture package first.
channel: in-session founder message 2026-07-08, recorded per M03 lesson

does_not_unlock: building or deploying any substrate component
scheduled automation of any factory line
client-facing surfaces or authenticated client workspace
